finding_results.notes: Reworked the forensic reveal and aftermath to include specific manipulation artifacts (machine kerfs, mixed suture materials, wax-packed seam, wired cartilage, dye application) plus immediate embodied reaction from Lena (acid swallow, physical bracing).
finding_results.summary: Core reveal now lands through concrete physical evidence and in-scene bodily consequence rather than abstract framing.

finding_results.notes: Added explicit safeguard policy (no family/funeral-home identifiers until unopened-bottle lot corroboration) and explicit accepted cost (benching/write-up risk for Lena and Beau). Reinforced same safeguard at the later pressure point.
finding_results.summary: Scapegoat risk now triggers a concrete tactical commitment with stated institutional consequences.

finding_results.notes: Inserted a failed digital-record attempt (scrubbed portal printout) that forces a tactic shift to legacy carbon manifests, and required cross-check of the B&S detour clue (carbon-layer pressure + fleet-card vendor pings) before trust.
finding_results.summary: Investigative chain now feels contested and causal, with resistance, adaptation, and corroboration before committing to key leads.

summary: All three structural/craft findings were addressed with targeted scene-level revisions that strengthen causality, embodied stakes, anti-scapegoat decision logic, and hard-won investigative progression while preserving chapter continuity and voice.
